lines.ja: VOCAL:Hatsune Miku V4 (English)
Tell me what I see
lines.zh: 告诉我，你看见了什么

lines.ja: Paint a vivid scene
lines.zh: 将那画面描绘的愈加鲜明

lines.ja: Taste and feel, no disbelief
lines.zh: 用心去感受，不留一丝迟疑

lines.ja: Balancing your dreams
lines.zh: 平衡你的梦境

lines.ja: And your favorite themes
lines.zh: 与心之所向的共鸣

lines.ja: With the real world underneath
lines.zh: 在现实中并行不悖

lines.ja: You know, I know it hurts sometimes
lines.zh: 你我心知肚明，有时难免身心俱疲

lines.ja: Stretched to the limit of our daily lives
lines.zh: 被日常琐事拉扯至极限

lines.ja: To just set aside a few hours of our time, time, time
lines.zh: 只为挤出片刻宁静

lines.ja: But just before we say good night
lines.zh: 但在道晚安之前

lines.ja: I'll capture the essence of things we like
lines.zh: 我会捕捉我们所爱的瞬间

lines.ja: And weave 'em all together, make a piece of paradise
lines.zh: 编织成属于我们的乐土

lines.ja: Cuz I'm making room for a fantasy
lines.zh: 因为我为幻想留了一席之地

lines.ja: I wonder if you slept right next to me
lines.zh: 渴望你依偎在我身旁

lines.ja: Our dreams would collide and intertwine
lines.zh: 我们的梦是否会交融缠绵

lines.ja: No nightmares, just how things ought to be
lines.zh: 没有梦魇，一切如心所愿

lines.ja: Never wished for anything
lines.zh: 从未奢求过什么

lines.ja: But I'd take every chance you'd give to me
lines.zh: 但我会紧握你给我的每一个机会

lines.ja: To stay by your side, through darkness and light
lines.zh: 在你身旁，无论黑夜与白昼

lines.ja: So I'll dream
lines.zh: 所以我选择，继续梦想

lines.ja: Take a memory
lines.zh: 拾起一段回忆

lines.ja: Scale it up, fullscreen
lines.zh: 铺满无垠的心底

lines.ja: It'd be strange if one day it were deleted
lines.zh: 若某天它被抹去，该有多么可惜

lines.ja: What-ifs and maybes
lines.zh: 那些"如果"和"或许"

lines.ja: What's the point of these
lines.zh: 又有何意义呢

lines.ja: When we don't learn a thing from second guessing?
lines.zh: 当自我怀疑无法带来丝毫启迪？

lines.ja: (Hindsight is hardly 20/20)
lines.zh: （事后回望，也未必尽如人意）

lines.ja: I know it's hard to recognize
lines.zh: 我知道，这往往难以察觉

lines.ja: The vibrance of magic under pale blue skies
lines.zh: 苍蓝穹顶下，流光溢彩

lines.ja: And sunset is bleeding red and yellow, lilac dyes
lines.zh: 夕阳正漫开红黄交织的紫罗兰色晕彩

lines.ja: (Dyes, dyes) Woah
I know you hate to say goodbyes
lines.zh: 我知道你厌恶别离

lines.ja: But take my hand, I'll show you that we, too, can fly
lines.zh: 牵住我的手，我会让你看到，我们也能翱翔

lines.ja: Tell me all the secrets that you'd like
lines.zh: 告诉我，你藏匿于心底的秘密

lines.ja: Cuz I'm making room for a fantasy
lines.zh: 因为我为幻想留了一席之地

lines.ja: I wonder if you slept right next to me
lines.zh: 渴望你依偎在我身旁

lines.ja: Our dreams would collide and intertwine
lines.zh: 我们的梦是否会交融缠绵

lines.ja: No nightmares, just how things ought to be
lines.zh: 没有梦魇，只剩应有的安宁

lines.ja: Never wished for anything
lines.zh: 从未奢求过什么

lines.ja: But I'd take every chance you'd give to me
lines.zh: 但我会抓住你给我的每一个机会

lines.ja: To stay by your side, through darkness and light
lines.zh: 在你身旁，无论黑夜与白昼

lines.ja: So I'll dream
lines.zh: 所以我选择，继续梦想

lines.ja: Oh, though ashes always fall after the blaze
lines.zh: 哦，尽管烈焰过后，灰烬终会飘落

lines.ja: A rainbow always shows after it rains
lines.zh: 但雨过天晴，彩虹总会挂起

lines.ja: And through the darkest night the sun remains
lines.zh: 纵使黑夜漫长，太阳终将闪耀

lines.ja: So trust me, have a little faith
lines.zh: 所以相信我，你能做到的

lines.ja: (Ah…)
Cuz I'm making room for a fantasy
lines.zh: 因为我为幻想留了一席之地

lines.ja: I wonder if you slept right next to me
lines.zh: 渴望你依偎在我身旁

lines.ja: Our dreams would collide and intertwine
lines.zh: 我们的梦是否会交织成歌

lines.ja: No nightmares, just how things ought to be
lines.zh: 没有梦魇，一切如愿以偿

lines.ja: Never wished for anything
lines.zh: 从未奢求过什么

lines.ja: But I'd take every chance you'd give to me
lines.zh: 但我会抓住你给我的每一个机会

lines.ja: To stay by your side, through darkness and light
lines.zh: 在你身旁，无论黑夜与白昼

lines.ja: So I'll dream
lines.zh: 所以我将继续梦想

lines.ja: Cuz I'm making room for a fantasy
lines.zh: 因为我为幻想留下了一片晴空

lines.ja: I wonder if you slept right next to me
lines.zh: 想让你依偎在我身旁

lines.ja: Our dreams would collide and intertwine
lines.zh: 我们的梦是否会交融缠绵

lines.ja: No nightmares, just how things ought to be
lines.zh: 没有梦魇，一切如心所愿

lines.ja: Never wished for anything
lines.zh: 从未奢求过什么

lines.ja: But I'd take every chance you'd give to me, yeah
lines.zh: 但我会抓住你给我的每一个机会

lines.ja: So I'll dream
lines.zh: 所以，我将继续梦想
